products.name: Bluetooth Headphones
products.return_policy: Returns accepted within 30 days if unopened. Defective items can be returned within 30 days.

faq.question: Are these headphones wireless?
faq.answer: Yes, the SoundMax Bluetooth Headphones connect wirelessly via Bluetooth.

faq.question: Do they support noise cancellation?
faq.answer: They support passive noise isolation but do not have active noise cancellation.

faq.question: What is the battery life?
faq.answer: The battery lasts up to 20 hours on a full charge.

products.name: Smart Watch
products.return_policy: Returns accepted within 14 days. Product must be in original condition.

faq.question: Is the smart watch waterproof?
faq.answer: The FitPro Smart Watch is water-resistant up to 50 meters.

faq.question: Does it support heart rate monitoring?
faq.answer: Yes, it includes continuous heart rate monitoring.

faq.question: Which phones are compatible?
faq.answer: Compatible with Android and iOS devices.

faq.question: Does this mouse require batteries?
faq.answer: Yes, it requires one AA battery.

faq.question: Is it compatible with Mac and Windows?
faq.answer: Yes, it works with both MacOS and Windows.

products.name: USB-C Charging Cable
products.return_policy: Returns accepted within 30 days for unused items.

faq.question: Does it support fast charging?
faq.answer: Yes, it supports fast charging up to 60W.
